message:
test(doctor): add unit tests for doctor.rs

Add 14 unit tests covering:

Argument parsing (9 tests):
- Default values for all options
- --check with safety/security/recovery
- --fix, --check-lock, --break-lock, --comprehensive
- Combined options

RecoveryReport (4 tests):
- Empty report state
- Report with non-critical issues
- Report with critical issues (severity 1)
- had_work() for all recovery actions

Available checks (1 test):
- Documents the available check types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
